name: My Mother's Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Beat in the eggs and light cream.
3. Mix in the flour, baking powder, salt, nutmeg, lemon juice, and vanilla.
4. Chill the dough for at least one hour.
5. Roll out the dough on a floured surface to about 1/8 inch thickness.
6. Cut into shapes using cookie cutters.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 8 minutes until golden brown.
8. Do not overbake, as this will cause them to become too dark.
9. Decorate as desired.
Makes 4-5 dozen cookies.
